name: sxl-resolver
description: Design token IntelliSense for JSON/JSONC and CSS var(): resolved values, previews, alias chains, completion, and source navigation.

scripts.package:vsix: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npx @vscode/vsce package
scripts.release:all: npm run publish:vscode && npm run publish:openvsx
scripts.all-release: npm run lint && npm run lint:fix && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run publish:vscode && npm run publish:openvsx

sxlResolver.tokenPaths.description: Paths to token folders (relative to workspace root). Multiple folders are merged.

sxlResolver.showIcons.description: Show type icons in hover tooltips.

sxlResolver.maxChainLength.description: Maximum chain depth displayed in hover tooltips.

sxlResolver.allowNoDollar.description: Recognize tokens defined without a leading '$' (e.g. 'value' instead of '$value').

sxlResolver.cssVariablePrefix.description: Prefix used for CSS variable reverse mapping (e.g. '--' for var(--token-name)).

sxlResolver.enableCssHover.description: Enable hover tooltips for var(--token-name) in CSS/SCSS/TSX files.

sxlResolver.enableCssCompletion.description: Enable autocomplete for CSS custom property names inside var(--token-name).

sxlResolver.cssVariableSources.description: Additional CSS variable sources. Use this to index published token/style packages without scanning all node_modules.

oneOf.description: Workspace-relative or absolute CSS file/folder path.

name.description: Human-readable source name shown in completion details.

package.description: Package name to resolve from the nearest workspace package.json, for example @org/design-system-styles.

entrypoints.description: CSS/SCSS/Less/Sass files or folders. Package sources resolve these paths relative to the package root and follow CSS @import files in order.

paths.description: Alias for entrypoints. For non-package sources paths are relative to the workspace root or absolute.

manifests.description: Optional SXL token manifest JSON files with cssVar/type/value/resolvedValue metadata for exact CSS token types.

appliesTo.description: Workspace-relative glob patterns for files that should use this source, for example apps/storefront/**.

commands.title: SXL Resolver: Reveal Token in File
